name: status-bar-btn
description: Register custom buttons in the status bar with a simple configuration.
author: DuckyMomo20012 <tienvinh.duong4@gmail.com>

status-bar-btn.enabled.description: Enable or disable the status bar button.

status-bar-btn.interpolation.os.interval.description: The interval in milliseconds for updating OS stats in the status bar.

status-bar-btn.btns.description: An array of button configurations for the status bar.

items.description: Configuration for a single status bar button.

id.description: The identifier of this item. Falls back to extension ID if omitted.

alignment.description: The alignment of this item in the status bar (Left or Right).

priority.description: The priority of this item. Higher values push the item further to the left.

name.description: The descriptive name of the entry (e.g., `Git Status`), visible in user settings.

text.description: The text to show. Supports octicons using the `$(icon-name)` syntax.

tooltip.description: The tooltip text displayed when hovering over this entry.

isTrusted.description: Indicates that this markdown string is from a trusted source. Only *trusted* markdown supports links that execute commands, e.g. `[Run it](command:myCommandId)`. Defaults to `false` (commands are disabled).

supportThemeIcons.description: Indicates that this markdown string can contain [ThemeIcons](https://code.visualstudio.com/api/references/vscode-api#ThemeIcon), e.g. `$(zap)`.

color.description: The foreground text/icon color for this entry.

anyOf.description: A traditional hex/color string or theme token identifier.
A dedicated VS Code ThemeColor instance reference wrapper.

backgroundColor.description: The background color for this entry. Officially supports `statusBarItem.errorBackground` or `statusBarItem.warningBackground`.

command.description: The identifier string or complete Command object to run on click.

anyOf.description: The ID string of the command to execute.

command.description: The identifier of the actual command handler.

tooltip.description: A tooltip for the command, when represented in the UI.

arguments.description: Arguments that the command handler should be invoked with.

accessibilityInformation.description: Accessibility information used when a screen reader interacts with this item.

visible.description: Whether the status bar item is visible

showOnWorkspaceContains.markdownDescription: A [glob pattern](https://code.visualstudio.com/docs/editor/codebasics#_advanced-search-options) that this status bar item should be visible for.

showOnLanguage.markdownDescription: An array of [language identifiers](https://code.visualstudio.com/docs/languages/identifiers) that this status bar item should be visible for **ACTIVE** text editor. RegEx patterns (and flags) are supported (e.g., `/^python/gm`).

showOnFileName.markdownDescription: An array of file names (or RegEx patterns) that this status bar item should be visible for **ACTIVE** text editor. RegEx patterns (and flags) are supported (e.g., `/^README.md$/gm`).

showOnFileText.markdownDescription: An array of text patterns (or RegEx patterns) that this status bar item should be visible for **ACTIVE** text editor. RegEx patterns (and flags) are supported (e.g., `/TODO/gm`).

interpolation.description: Interpolation settings for this status bar item.

clockTimezone.description: The IANA timezone name to use for clock interpolation. If omitted, defaults to host system timezone.
